description: Output schema for merchant encounter results

outcome_schema.action: string — buy | sell | barter | browse | leave
outcome_schema.result_code: string — success | insufficient_funds | item_not_found | barter_success | barter_fail | browsed | left
outcome_schema.gold_change: number — net gold change (positive = gained, negative = spent)
items_added: string — item names added to party inventory
items_removed: string — item names removed from party inventory
outcome_schema.party_gold_after: number — party gold balance after transaction
